title: Create: Melodies & Mechanisms
description: Craft and replicate music discs through elegant automation with Create's mechanical wonders.
body:
# *IMPORTANT* * This mod **requires** [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). * This mod is compatible with [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport). --- ![banner_img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DR43yPHa/images/801a9e736afb0087062434a8eac5ebd6ba828682.png) ## _Description_ **Create: Melodies & Mechanisms** brings an industrial twist to music creation in Minecraft. Craft your favorite **music discs** from scratch using automated **Create machines**, and experience the magic of music through mechanics. Forget dungeon RNG — now you **engineer your soundtracks**. ## 🎛️ Crafting the Blank Disc Plate Everything starts with the **Deepslate Disc Plate** — a crafted blank used to record a music disc. Use a combination of: - **Pressing** to mold deepslate into a clean, flat disc. > Every disc uses the same base, but the ingredients and sequence afterward will define the sound. ## 🎶 Sequenced Disc Creation Once your plate is ready, it's time to **program the melody**. - Use **Deployers** to embed unique materials (Emeralds, Echo Shards, Amethysts…) into the plate — simulating the music's "soul". - **Press** the plate to finalize the recording.
> Different materials lead to different discs. For example: > - Amethyst Shard + Emerald = `music_disc_otherside` > - Echo Shard + Sculk = `music_disc_5` > - And more to discover. ## ⚙️ Fully Automatable, Just Like Create Should Be Every process is **loopable, automatable, and expandable** using belts, arms, sequencers, and more. You control the factory, the rhythm, and the output. No more praying to loot tables. ## ✅ Result The end product is a **genuine vanilla music disc**, earned through a satisfying mechanical process. Perfect for immersive survival bases, Create-centered modpacks, or custom maps where music plays a role. ## Check out my other mods and texture pack ! [![create-templates-gears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ubfQJZV7/images/5b7682b5f373f2dfd90561cda9c96f642bec0990.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-templates-gears) [![create-extra-recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uUsD8Drs/images/18c35900ac7df1829227b6299f3b591e19b8a715.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-extra-recipes-kuma) [![colorcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eEFJhRYv/images/2e31d7a074cbb34170d974221063c4390b9332a8.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/textcolorcraft) [![ascendedalloys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6kjnAD62/images/7db9639b95699eb2128fb817f8fc8b501e8367b4.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascendedalloys)
